title: UNTIL a DATE arrives do that....

posts.author: tsachid1 (Tsachi)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi to all,

It looks to me very strange that through all the complex autoations Monday offers, UNTIL a DATE arrives | AS LONG AS Status is SOMETHING then do this and that automation is not existing???

I want my board to send me an email reminder every day and as long as the status is set to “WORKING ON IT” or UNTIL a DATE arrives…

It looks to me very strange that Monday currently does not offer UNTIL / AS LONG AS Automations…

Can someome fix this simple Features and confirm it is ready to use?

thanks in advance!
Tsachi@remot.energy
